/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/X:DEFT WAIVES 10, BUT NOT 60 DAYS/LD:07-07-08/987,2/ORPJ/X:DEFT TO CALL ORP TWO TIMES PER WEEK/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
